actionUnits.condition: Call Inventory.ToggleVisibility() on MonoBehaviour fileID 985 (script GUID 3652d147b24254c618ce4989e3b9003c). This simulates GvrController.AppButtonUp to toggle the CanvasGroup (alpha and blocksRaycasts) and flip isVisible. Note: The Inventory object currently shows no Rigidbody/Collider/EventTrigger in scene meta; if required by the harness, add a temporary Collider/EventTrigger to allow manual triggering.
